vulnerability.reference: Random token probing reveals statistical differences between watermarked and unwatermarked tokens, enabling stripping.
vulnerability.generated: Red-green list watermarks rely on secret n-gram lists that can be statistically inferred through random selection probing.

impact.reference: Academic institutions and review platforms suffer from undetectable AI-generated cheating and mass manipulation.
impact.generated: Machine-generated text evades detection, causing false negatives that allow unaccountable dissemination of fabricated content.

dose_response.reference: Random token probing reveals watermark token biases, stripping signals from red-green list detection systems, enabling undetectable AI cheating that harms academic integrity.
dose_response.generated: Watermark removal and evasion attacks, through detection systems using red-green list watermarks, trigger statistical inference of secret n-gram lists via random selection probing, leading to false negatives that enable unaccountable dissemination of fabricated content.
